prompt:
Identify which facts in a school knowledge corpus need to be updated in response to a change request.

Change request:
Update the late arrival fee threshold: the €5 fee now applies from the third late arrival in the year, not the fifth.

Candidate facts (fact_id | source | content | tags):
school_hours_punctuality_and_drop_off_pick_up_late_arrivals__all__0 | school-hours-punctuality-and-drop-off-pick-up/late-arrivals | A fee of €5 per late arrival will be charged monthly starting from the fifth late arrival in the school year. | [school-hours, attendance]
school_hours_punctuality_and_drop_off_pick_up_late_pick_ups__all__0 | school-hours-punctuality-and-drop-off-pick-up/late-pick-ups | Families are charged a late pick-up fee of €5 if they arrive between 4:55 p.m. and 5:15 p.m. to collect their children from school. | [school-hours, late-pick-ups]
school_hours_punctuality_and_drop_off_pick_up_late_pick_ups__all__2 | school-hours-punctuality-and-drop-off-pick-up/late-pick-ups | Families are charged a late pick-up fee of €20 if they arrive between 5:31 p.m. and 5:45 p.m. to collect their children from school. | [school-hours, late-pick-ups]
school_hours_punctuality_and_drop_off_pick_up_late_pick_ups__all__1 | school-hours-punctuality-and-drop-off-pick-up/late-pick-ups | Families are charged a late pick-up fee of €10 if they arrive between 5:16 p.m. and 5:30 p.m. to collect their children from school. | [school-hours, late-pick-ups]
school_hours_punctuality_and_drop_off_pick_up_late_arrivals__all__2 | school-hours-punctuality-and-drop-off-pick-up/late-arrivals | If a high frequency of late arrivals is detected, Guides will arrange a meeting with the family. | [school-hours, attendance, punctuality]
school_hours_punctuality_and_drop_off_pick_up_principles__all__1 | school-hours-punctuality-and-drop-off-pick-up/principles | Arrivals after 9:00 a.m. can disrupt the flow of activities, as students who arrived earlier have already begun their work and guides are engaged in presenting materials, potentially causing late-arriving students to feel disoriented or unsettled. | [school-hours, attendance, punctuality]
school_hours_and_attendance_late_arrival__all__0 | school-hours-and-attendance/late-arrival | Students arriving after 8:30 AM must check in at the school office to receive a tardy slip before proceeding to class. | [student-tardiness]
school_hours_and_attendance_late_arrival__all__1 | school-hours-and-attendance/late-arrival | Persistent lateness may result in meetings with parents to discuss the impact on the student's performance. | [student-tardiness]
school_hours_punctuality_and_drop_off_pick_up_late_arrivals__all__1 | school-hours-punctuality-and-drop-off-pick-up/late-arrivals | Students who arrive late disrupt the learning environment and miss essential instructions. | [school-hours, attendance, punctuality]
school_hours_punctuality_and_drop_off_pick_up_early_pick_ups__all__2 | school-hours-punctuality-and-drop-off-pick-up/early-pick-ups | All early pick-ups take place at Reception. | [school-hours, attendance]

For each fact that is directly affected by this change request, provide:
- fact_id: the exact ID from the list above
- relevance: 1–5 (5 = primary fact to update, 4 = clearly affected, 3 = indirectly affected and should be reviewed)
- reason: one sentence explaining specifically why this fact needs to change

Only include facts with relevance ≥ 3.
Do not include facts that are merely on the same general topic but not actually changed by this specific request.
raw_response: {"affected_facts":[{"fact_id":"school_hours_punctuality_and_drop_off_pick_up_late_arrivals__all__0","relevance":5,"reason":"This fact explicitly states the threshold for late arrival fees, which directly needs updating from the fifth to the third late arrival per the change request."}]}

affected_facts.reason: This fact explicitly states the threshold for late arrival fees, which directly needs updating from the fifth to the third late arrival per the change request.
